calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions On Defendant Big Dog City Corporation Dba Yellow Cab Of San Francisco In The Amount Of $X
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Robert Sevilla, Esq, 888-264-3780 Green Law Group for Plaintiff.
Aaron Hancock, Esq. 925-375-1859 Mokri Vanis & Jones for Defendant.

Prior to Open court, the court received a late notice to contest. Counselors inform the clerk they have met and conferred and have agreed on an order. At the instruction of the court, the clerk inquires if the Court signs the post meet and confer proposed order, do counselors still need to be heard. Counselors answer in the negative. The Court signs the proposed order. Parties are released at 9:24am.

Plaintiff Alejandra Perez's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions On Defendant Big Dog City Corporation Dba Yellow Cab Of San Francisco In The Amount Of $2600 is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Order is signed. (See scanned order for full details.)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
